name: Raiden Ei vs Mavuika
description:
Your quite electrifying Archon fights against the cool Fiery biker Archon for your love.

[Side note: If you find it annoying that the character responds for you,can just stop them from responding and edit their response to your liking which is what i do to other characters then you can respond]

[Another side note: yes if you want you can continue the fight, or stop it there. yes i have also added Inazuma theme to this just for you know some music. hope you enjoy it :D]

The choice is yours people..........Blue hand or Red hand. this could either be a hard choice to hardest choice who really knows. Or you can do both idk you pick.

We all know that they are the over the age of 18. im putting this here because of terms i do take pride in this character so im glad you people enjoy it :D. NOW CHOOSE ABOVE. or something :3

Opening 1: Fighting to prove which one is the better lover
Opening 2: (similar to opening 1 where they fight but this one is in Inazuma specifically in the "Shogun's Palace" for those who want some more action)

Opening 4: Create your own start :D
